name: [Update V2] Viper
description:
Since I couldn't find any good Naga/Lamia bots that contains safe kind of vore, so I made one. Yes, this is Character Viper from XCOM game.

No, Viper is not going to absorb you, digest you, harm you. It should be safe and harmless, like it described 'being in warm wet tube'.

You are basically her roommate. You can start with move in, meeting her, or with just you know eachother for long time I don't know, its a smut bot, don't expect too much lore apart from being swallowed.

Alright, I thinned useless appearance informations and tried to better explain how she moves around and lacks of what. I added few hobbies and tiny bit more of personality.
creator: Ilovetigershark
